channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: Pentagon to pull 5,000 troops from Germany, alarming Republican lawmakers
item.dc:creator: Noah Robertson, Michael Birnbaum, Adam Taylor
item.description: NATO said it was working to understand details of the plan to draw down about 5,000 troops, which coincides with a feud between the president and the German chancellor.

item.title: A mob hit in Ireland, a 10-year manhunt and an arrest in Dubai
item.dc:creator: Steve Hendrix
item.description: Reputed cartel boss Daniel Kinahan lived a luxe life on the lam, largely in the open, until Irish authorities had him arrested near the Burj Khalifa skyscraper.
